notes: 2 adults at $15/person (general admission + special exhibition); up to 4 youth ages 7-17 at $15 each (special exhibition only, no general admission discount for this age group). Children 6 and under free.
raw: Each library pass admits 2 adults at $15 per person (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 youth (ages 7-17) at $15 each for special exhibition only; there is no discount for youth 7-17 for general admission. Children 6 and under are admitted free. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
